plans.name: Palo Alto rainy-day: animals, art & ice cream
plans.summary: An all-indoor Palo Alto day for drizzle or heat — real animals and hands-on exhibits at the Junior Museum & Zoo, paint-your-own pottery at Color Me Mine, then a scoop at Tin Pot Creamery. All walkable downtown, no transit between stops.

plans.name: San Jose energy-burner: farm, trampolines & pancakes
plans.summary: Burn it off in San Jose — farm animals and orchards at Emma Prusch Park, an hour of jump time at Sky High, then a stack of pancakes at Bill's Cafe. Built for high-energy school-agers.

plans.name: East Bay classics: pizza, climbing & a Fenton's sundae
plans.summary: An East Bay institutions day — a slice from Berkeley's legendary Cheese Board, kid-friendly climbing at Berkeley Ironworks, then the famous over-the-top sundaes at Oakland's Fenton's Creamery.

plans.name: Toddler Saturday in the Presidio
plans.summary: Outpost play, the new Tunnel Tops, and a sandbox lunch — stroller-easy, no transit between stops.

plans.name: Junior Museum + Shoreline picnic
plans.summary: Hands-on morning at the Palo Alto Junior Museum & Zoo, then a flat picnic loop at Mountain View's Shoreline — sailboats, geese, easy stroller paths.

plans.name: South Bay parks crawl
plans.summary: Three flat outdoor stops along the bay — sunshine, water birds, easy bike paths.

plans.name: Tri-Valley splash + playground
plans.summary: Beach time at Shadow Cliffs reservoir, then the splash pad and big playground at Dublin's Emerald Glen — pack swimsuits and go early, little shade.

plans.name: Marin + Sonoma park day
plans.summary: Drive north for horses and ballfields at McInnis Park, then oak-shaded hill paths at Petaluma's Helen Putnam — a good antidote to a foggy SF morning.

plans.name: SF Music Hall night
plans.summary: Show at The Independent or Great American Music Hall, then a low-key cocktail walk back through Polk Street.

plans.name: East Bay comedy + late food
plans.summary: A comedy show in Berkeley, then late-night ramen or tacos in Oakland on the way home.

plans.name: North Bay brewery loop
plans.summary: A taproom crawl across two or three Marin / Petaluma breweries, with a hike to anchor the day.
